author: BetaGifted
description: Summarize local Markdown transaction logs into an offline finance dashboard. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: BetaGifted
manifest.description: Summarize local Markdown transaction logs into an offline finance dashboard.
manifest.name: Auto Ledger

name: Auto Ledger

releases.author: s945134636-spec
releases.description:
Initial community-ready release of Auto Ledger.

- Summarizes local Markdown transaction logs in Obsidian.
- Reads Dataview-style inline fields.
- Works offline without network access or telemetry.
- Includes dashboard totals, category ranking, member distribution, recent transactions, and review items.
releases.name: Auto Ledger 0.2.0
